revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月17日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 == * [[永正]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1513年]][[4月22日]]） - [[立花道雪]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]{{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}}） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1797年]][[4月13日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（+ [[1858年]]） * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[4月17日]]） - [[三田村鳶魚]]、[[随筆家]]・時代考証家（+ [[1952年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1941年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[大化]]5年（ユリウス暦[[649年]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737年]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月17日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと ==
== 誕生日 == * [[永正]]10年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1513年]][[4月22日]]） - [[立花道雪]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585年]]{{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}}） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1797年]][[4月13日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（+ [[1858年]]） * [[明治]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1870年]][[4月17日]]） - [[三田村鳶魚]]、[[随筆家]]・時代考証家（+ [[1952年]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1941年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[大化]]5年（ユリウス暦[[649年]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737年]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days

Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 17'''<!--Lunar March17--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。

== 忌日 == * [[大化]]5年（ユリウス暦[[649年]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737年]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139年]]）

{{Lunar March}} '''March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 17'''<!--Lunar March17 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の17日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。

== Deaths == * [[大化]]5年（ユリウス暦[[649年]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[806年]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737年]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1162年]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139年]]）

[[sn:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]]10年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1513]][[4月22日]]） - [[立花道雪]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585]]{{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}}） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1797]][[4月13日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（+ [[1858]]） * [[明治]]3年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[4月17日]]） - [[三田村鳶魚]]、[[随筆家]]・時代考証家（+ [[1952]]） * 明治3年（グレゴリオ暦1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1941]]）
== Deaths == * [[大化]]5年（ユリウス暦[[649]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[806]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737]]） * [[応保]]2年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1162]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]]10年（[[Julian Calendar]][[1513]][[4月22日]]） - [[立花道雪]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585]]{{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}}） * [[寛政]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1797]][[4月13日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（+ [[1858]]） * [[明治]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[4月17日]]） - [[三田村鳶魚]]、[[随筆家]]・時代考証家（+ [[1952]]） * 明治3rd year（グレゴリオ暦1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1941]]）
== Deaths == * [[大化]]5年（ユリウス暦[[649]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[806]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737]]） * [[応保]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1162]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139]]）

[[sn:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]]10th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1513]][[4月22日]]） - [[立花道雪]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585]]{{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}}） * [[寛政]]9th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1797]][[4月13日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（+ [[1858]]） * [[明治]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[4月17日]]） - [[三田村鳶魚]]、[[随筆家]]・時代考証家（+ [[1952]]） * 明治3rd year（グレゴリオ暦1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1941]]）
== Deaths == * [[大化]]5th year（ユリウス暦[[649]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[806]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737]]） * [[応保]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1162]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]]10th year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1513]][[4月22日]]） - [[立花道雪]]、[[武将]]（+ [[1585]]{{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}}） * [[Kansei]]9th year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1797]][[4月13日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（+ [[1858]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1870]][[4月17日]]） - [[三田村鳶魚]]、[[随筆家]]・時代考証家（+ [[1952]]） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]]、[[軍人]]（+ [[1941]]）
== Deaths == * [[大化]]5th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[649]][[5月3日]]） - [[阿倍内麻呂]]、[[飛鳥時代]]の[[豪族]]（生年不明） * [[大同 (日本)|大同]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[806]][[4月9日]]） - [[桓武天皇]]、50代[[天皇]]（* [[737]]） * [[応保]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1162]][[5月2日]]） - [[平基盛]]、[[伊勢平氏|平家]]の武将（* [[1139]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}

[[sn:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[4月22日]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[4月13日]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[4月17日]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[5月3日]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[5月2日]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[4月22日]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[4月13日]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[4月17日]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[5月3日]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[5月2日]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}

[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[qq62]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[qq39]] ）

[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、[[武将]] （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[随筆家]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[軍人]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[天皇]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢平氏|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[Essayist]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870年4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢Taira Clan|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[Essayist]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢Taira Clan|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）

[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[Essayist]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢Taira Clan|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 17일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] [[zh:三月十七]] [[en:draft:March 17 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[Essayist]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢Taira Clan|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月十七]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events ==
== Births == * [[永正]] 10th year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1513]] [[April 22]] ） - [[立花道雪]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （+ [[1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165}} ） * [[Kansei]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1797]] [[April 13]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（+ [[1858]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1870]] [[April 17]] ） - [[三田村鳶魚]] 、[[Essayist]] ・時代考証家（+ [[1952]] ） * 明治3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1870th year 4月17日） - [[谷口尚真]] 、[[Military Personnel]] （+ [[1941]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika|ja|大化}} 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[649]] [[May 3]] ） - [[阿倍内麻呂]] 、[[飛鳥時代]] の[[豪族]] （生年不明） * [[Daidō]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[806]] [[April 9]] ） - [[桓武天皇]] 、50代[[Emperor of Japan]] （* [[737]] ） * [[応保]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1162]] [[May 2]] ） - [[平基盛]] 、[[伊勢Taira Clan|平家]] の武将（* [[1139]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839284]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 17|qq=March 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1513|1513]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Toyotachi Dōsetsu]], a military commander, was born (died [[:en:1585|1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).

== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1513|1513]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Toyotachi Dōsetsu]], a military commander, was born (died [[:en:1585|1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|qq=|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died [[:en:1952|1952]]). * 明治3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1870, [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|qq=|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died [[:en:1941|1941]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – {{ill|Abenai Maro|ja|阿倍内麻呂|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenai Maro|qq=|1=Abe no Uchimaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11657240}}, a noble from the Asuka period (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Daidō|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]], the 50th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:737|737]]). * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Taira Motomori|ja|平基盛|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Motomori|qq=|1=Taira Motomori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482316}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born [[:en:1139|1139]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1513|1513]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Toyotachi Dōsetsu]], a military commander, was born (died [[:en:1585|1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died [[:en:1952|1952]]). * 明治3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1870, [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died [[:en:1941|1941]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – {{ill|Abenai Maro|ja|阿倍内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenai Maro|1=Abe no Uchimaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11657240}}, a noble from the Asuka period (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Daidō|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]], the 50th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:737|737]]). * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Taira Motomori|ja|平基盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Motomori|1=Taira Motomori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482316}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born [[:en:1139|1139]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. == Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1513|1513]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Toyotachi Dōsetsu]], a military commander, was born (died [[:en:1585|1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died [[:en:1952|1952]]). * 明治3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1870, [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died [[:en:1941|1941]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – {{ill|Abenai Maro|ja|阿倍内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenai Maro|1=Abe no Uchimaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11657240}}, a noble from the Asuka period (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Daidō|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]], the 50th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:737|737]]). * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Taira Motomori|ja|平基盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Motomori|1=Taira Motomori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482316}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born [[:en:1139|1139]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十七]][[zh:三月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839284]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 17|qq=March 17}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1513|1513]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Toyotachi Dōsetsu]], a military commander, was born (died [[:en:1585|1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died [[:en:1952|1952]]). * 明治3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1870, [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died [[:en:1941|1941]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – {{ill|Abenai Maro|ja|阿倍内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenai Maro|1=Abe no Uchimaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11657240}}, a noble from the Asuka period (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Daidō|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]], the 50th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:737|737]]). * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Taira Motomori|ja|平基盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Motomori|1=Taira Motomori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482316}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born [[:en:1139|1139]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|16|3|18|2|17|4|3|0317|qq=}}

* [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died [[:en:1952|1952]]). * 明治3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1870, [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died [[:en:1941|1941]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十七]][[zh:三月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十七]][[zh:三月十七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 17 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月17日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 17일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 17 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十七]][[zh:三月十七]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839284]] Wikidata name: 17th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 17|qq=March 17}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 17일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 17''' is the 17th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1513|1513]] [[:en:April 22|April 22]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Toyotachi Dōsetsu]], a military commander, was born (died [[:en:1585|1585]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1797|1797]] [[:en:April 13|April 13]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1870|1870]] [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died [[:en:1952|1952]]). * 明治3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1870, [[:en:April 17|April 17]]) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died [[:en:1941|1941]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Taika (era)|Taika]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:649|649]] [[:en:May 3|May 3]]) – {{ill|Abenai Maro|ja|阿倍内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenai Maro|1=Abe no Uchimaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11657240}}, a noble from the Asuka period (birth year unknown). * [[:en:Daidō|Daidō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:806|806]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Kanmu|Emperor Kanmu]], the 50th Emperor of Japan (born [[:en:737|737]]). * [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1162|1162]] [[:en:May 2|May 2]]) – {{ill|Taira Motomori|ja|平基盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Motomori|1=Taira Motomori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482316}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born [[:en:1139|1139]]).

* {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|en|Ōhara Yūgaku|WD=Q11433147|lt=Ōhara Yūgaku}}, an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17}}) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952}}). * 明治3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1870, {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17}}) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died {{ill|1941|en|1941|WD=Q5231|lt=1941}}).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1513|en|1513|WD=Q6200|lt=1513}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22}}) – {{ill|Tachibana Dōsetsu|en|Tachibana Dōsetsu|WD=Q6379490|lt=Toyotachi Dōsetsu}}, a military commander, was born (died {{ill|1585|en|1585|WD=Q6736|lt=1585}} {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|en|Ōhara Yūgaku|WD=Q11433147|lt=Ōhara Yūgaku}}, an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17}}) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952}}). * 明治3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1870, {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17}}) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died {{ill|1941|en|1941|WD=Q5231|lt=1941}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|649|en|649|WD=Q31117|lt=649}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|WD=Q2547|lt=May 3}}) – {{ill|Abenai Maro|ja|阿倍内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenai Maro|1=Abe no Uchimaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11657240}}, a noble from the Asuka period (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Daidō|en|Daidō|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|806|en|806|WD=Q30021|lt=806}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|en|Emperor Kanmu|WD=Q314846|lt=Emperor Kanmu}}, the 50th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|737|en|737|WD=Q411351|lt=737}}). * {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1162|en|1162|WD=Q19667|lt=1162}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – {{ill|Taira Motomori|ja|平基盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Motomori|1=Taira Motomori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482316}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1513|en|1513|WD=Q6200|lt=1513}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22}}) – {{ill|Tachibana Dōsetsu|en|Tachibana Dōsetsu|WD=Q6379490|lt=Toyotachi Dōsetsu}}, a military commander, was born (died {{ill|1585|en|1585|WD=Q6736|lt=1585}} {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|en|Ōhara Yūgaku|WD=Q11433147|lt=Ōhara Yūgaku}}, an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17}}) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952}}). * 明治3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1870, {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17}}) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died {{ill|1941|en|1941|WD=Q5231|lt=1941}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|WD=Q1077930|lt=Taika}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|649|en|649|WD=Q31117|lt=649}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|WD=Q2547|lt=May 3}}) – {{ill|Abenai Maro|ja|阿倍内麻呂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abenai Maro|1=Abe no Uchimaro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11657240}}, a noble from the Asuka period (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Daidō|en|Daidō|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|806|en|806|WD=Q30021|lt=806}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|en|Emperor Kanmu|WD=Q314846|lt=Emperor Kanmu}}, the 50th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|737|en|737|WD=Q411351|lt=737}}). * {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|WD=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1162|en|1162|WD=Q19667|lt=1162}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|WD=Q2545|lt=May 2}}) – {{ill|Taira Motomori|ja|平基盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Motomori|1=Taira Motomori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11482316}}, a military commander of the Taira clan (born {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1513|en|1513|WD=Q6200|lt=1513|1=1513}} {{ill|April 22|en|April 22|WD=Q2526|lt=April 22|1=April 22}}) – {{ill|Tachibana Dōsetsu|en|Tachibana Dōsetsu|WD=Q6379490|lt=Toyotachi Dōsetsu|1=Tachibana Dōsetsu}}, a military commander, was born (died {{ill|1585|en|1585|WD=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}} {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}).
* {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797|1=1797}} {{ill|April 13|en|April 13|WD=Q2498|lt=April 13|1=April 13}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|en|Ōhara Yūgaku|WD=Q11433147|lt=Ōhara Yūgaku|1=Ōhara Yūgaku}}, an agricultural policy scholar, was born (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1870|en|1870|WD=Q7741|lt=1870|1=1870}} {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17|1=April 17}}) – {{ill|Mitanmura Tobiyu|ja|三田村鳶魚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitanmura Tobiyu|1=Engyo Mitamura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11356752}}, an essayist and historian, was born (died {{ill|1952|en|1952|WD=Q5272|lt=1952|1=1952}}). * 明治3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1870, {{ill|April 17|en|April 17|WD=Q2520|lt=April 17|1=April 17}}) – {{ill|Yanaguchi Naoma|ja|谷口尚真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanaguchi Naoma|1=Naomi Taniguchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11632695}}, a military officer, was born (died {{ill|1941|en|1941|WD=Q5231|lt=1941|1=1941}}).
